'''Ha-ran''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Eickarie]], of the Family [[Mish-ra]] and the Clan [[Sha-kae]]. He was a prince of the Tribe [[Si-shae-ral]] and a member of the resistance on his homeworld against [[The Warlord]] and his [[Lakra]]n mercenaries.

He encountered four members of the elite [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] [[Unit Aurek-Seven]] during the [[Capture of the Warlord|battle]] to liberate [[Kariek]] from the Warlord. He convinced the prisoners of The Warlord to unite, even though they were in different tribes. They had not heard of the [[United Tribes of Kariek]] before, and were still arguing and fighting.

==Appearances==
*''[[Fool's Bargain]]'' {{1st}}
